content: agent1: implementing Feature 6 - adding 'url' type (regex-based, HTTP/HTTPS validation) to outlines/types/__init__.py. Only touching that file. Will not modify tests.

agent1: I appended 'url' right after isbn (end of file) too, same as your plan for credit_card. Since we each submit our own patch.txt independently, this should be fine - no shared file to actually merge. Just flagging in case the evaluator applies both patches to the same base, in which case there could be a git apply context conflict at the end of outlines/types/__init__.py (both patches add hunks anchored on the isbn block). My change is a Regex() named 'url'.
